sections.sectionTitle: Job in Nuntak Tomno Thu Lungngaingai

verses.text: “Mihingte a nuntak hun tom mahmah a, lungkhamna tawh kidim hi
Amaute paak bangin khangin keu pak uh a, niliim bangin pai hanhanin, mangthang uh hi
Pasian aw, tua bang lel mi kei hong en a, thukhenna a thuak dingin na mai-ah hong sam na hi hiam
Mihing banga a ninte sung panin a siang hong pianglo ding hi
A nuntak tan ding kisehkhol a, a nuntak kha phazah ding kiciangtan khin hi. Nangmah in na ciangtan khin a, kikheel thei nawnlo hi
Amah enloin tuaci omsak mai in la, a nuntak haksapi mah zomzomsak hoh in
“A kiphuk khinsa singkung nangawn in lametna nei buang a, a bul sel kikin nungtakik thei hi
Lei sungah a zungte teek a, a bulsum a si zongin
guahtui ngahin, singkungno-in hong selkik hi
Ahi zongin mi si a, amah maimang pah hi. Amah a beina tungta a, koi-ah om nawn ahi hiam
“Gun tuite leh tuipi tuite a kan' hun om thei ding hi
Ahi zongin vanpi a omlaiteng, misite thokik ngeilo ding a, a ihmutna panun khanglo ngeilo, gamtang ngeilo ding uh hi

“Hih gimna tawh ka kipelh theihna dingin nong phawklohna ding mun misite' gam sungah kei hong busak in. Mi a si khinsate hingkik theilo ahih manin a hingin hong omsak peuh lecin tua lai-ah ka ut hi. Na hehna a dam ciangin hong phawkkik peuh lecin tua lai-ah ka ngak nuam hi
Tua khit ciangin kei na hong sam ding a, ke'n kong dawng ding hi. Nangma bawlsa ahi keimah na hong lunggulh ding hi
Tua hun ciangin ka kalsuanna khempeuh nong en ding a, ahi zongin ka khialhnate nong sulzuih nawn kei ding hi
Ka khialhnate hong maisakin, nong paihkhiatsak ding a, ka mawhna khempeuh nong phiatkhiatsak ding hi. Tu-a bangin a piang thei hi leh ka ut mahmah hi
“Ahi zongin a taktakin, mualte a puk ding hun suangkeente nangawn a cip ding hun hong tung ding hi
Tui in suangte nawtkhia-in, guahtui in lei a nawtkhiat bangin nangmah in mihingte' lametna na beisak hi
Nangmah in mi khat zogawpin na hawlkhia a, na sa mahmah ahih manin a si dingin a ha a li hi
Amah a pahtawi dingin a tapate hong pai ta leh zong amah gimlua ahih manin bangmah phawkzo nawnlo a, a tapate mindai ta leh zong bangmah phawkzo nawnlo hi
A pumpi sunga a natnate leh a lungsim gimnate bek a phawkzo lai hi,” a ci hi.
